blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,139 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
